brand_filter.origin: Buon Ma Thuot, Dak Lak, Vietnam
brand_filter.product_name: AODAI Level 1–6 Tasting Set – Freeze-Dried Vietnamese Espresso | 12 Pods
core_truth: Works in hot or cold water
guardrails: Do not describe AoDai as flavored coffee.
Do not mix AoDai positioning with Nonla flavor messaging.
Keep messaging focused on pure Vietnamese coffee.

audience_core.pain_point: Mainstream coffee feels too weak or bland
audience_core.desired_outcome: Wants stronger caffeine and bolder taste

message_pillars: Pure coffee with no sugar or additives
creative_angles: What if your morning coffee could be as strong as Vietnamese cafe culture demands?
The instant coffee that actually tastes like real coffee - because it IS real coffee
Skip the $5 coffee shop - get cafe-quality Vietnamese espresso at home in seconds
Finally, instant coffee for people who actually love strong coffee
6 intensity levels: Find your perfect strength from gentle to extra dark
No machine, no mess, no weak coffee - just pure Vietnamese Robusta power

claude_research_core.raw_response:
{
  "research_summary": {
    "overview": "AoDai Coffee is a Vietnamese freeze-dried instant coffee brand targeting US consumers seeking stronger coffee experiences. The brand leverages 100% Robusta beans from Buon Ma Thuot and advanced freeze-drying technology to deliver cafe-quality Vietnamese espresso without machines. They offer 6 intensity levels and position against weak mainstream coffee with authentic Vietnamese heritage.",
    "top_findings": [
      "Brand uses advanced freeze-drying technology that preserves original coffee structure, aroma, and flavor unlike traditional instant coffee",
      "Six roast levels (named after Vietnamese cities) allow customization from gentle to extra dark intensity",
      "100% Robusta beans from Central Highlands provide higher caffeine content and stronger flavor than typical Arabica blends",
      "No-machine convenience with instant dissolution in hot or cold water addresses modern lifestyle needs",
      "ISO 22000:2018 certified production facility with Halal certification ensures quality standards",
      "35% first order discount creates low-friction trial opportunity for premium-priced instant coffee"
    ],
    "key_risks": [
      "Premium pricing ($1+ per pod) significantly higher than mass market instant coffee may limit adoption",
      "Robusta beans traditionally associated with lower quality coffee in US market perception",
      "Instant coffee category faces strong negative perceptions among coffee enthusiasts",
      "Limited brand awareness competing against established coffee brands with larger marketing budgets",
      "Single origin dependency on Vietnamese suppliers creates supply chain vulnerability"
    ],
    "key_opportunities": [
      "Growing US interest in authentic international food experiences favors Vietnamese coffee positioning",
      "Remote work trends increase demand for convenient premium coffee solutions",
      "Health-conscious consumers appreciate sugar-free, additive-free pure coffee formulation",
      "Gift market potential with culturally-themed roast levels and premium packaging",
      "Cold brew trend aligns with product's ability to dissolve in cold water"
    ]
  },
  "trend_findings": [
    "Freeze-drying technology advancement allows premium instant coffee to compete with traditional brewing methods",
    "Convenience-focused coffee consumption driven by busy lifestyles and remote work patterns",
    "Authenticity and origin story becoming key differentiators in crowded coffee market",
    "Customizable intensity levels respond to growing demand for personalized beverage experiences",
    "Sugar-free and clean label products align with health and wellness movement",
    "Vietnamese coffee culture gaining recognition in US specialty coffee scene"
  ],
  "note_findings": [
    "Company operates two distinct lines: AoDai (pure coffee) and NonLa (flavored varieties) requiring careful positioning separation",
    "Selective harvesting process using only ripe red cherries demonstrates quality commitment above commodity coffee",
    "Vacuum freeze-drying preserves coffee without liquid phase transition, maintaining cellular structure",
    "City-named roast levels create cultural storytelling opportunity and memorable product differentiation",
    "ISO certification and quality control testing address food safety concerns in imported products",
    "Packaging designed for portability appeals to travelers and outdoor enthusiasts"
  ]
}

{
  "hooks": [
    "Finally, instant coffee for people who actually love strong coffee",
    "The instant coffee that actually tastes like real coffee - because it IS real coffee",
    "No machine, no mess, no weak coffee - just pure Vietnamese Robusta power",
    "Skip the $5 coffee shop - get cafe-quality Vietnamese espresso at home in seconds",
    "6 intensity levels: Find your perfect strength from gentle to extra dark",
    "What if your morning coffee could be as strong as Vietnamese cafe culture demands?",
    "Cafe-quality taste ready in seconds - no machine needed",
    "100% Vietnamese Robusta - maximum strength in every pod"
  ],
  "claims": [
    "100% Vietnamese Robusta from Buon Ma Thuot for maximum strength",
    "Freeze-dried technology preserves authentic cafe-quality taste",
    "Works in hot or cold water - dissolves instantly",
    "No machine needed - ultimate convenience",
    "Pure coffee with no sugar or additives",
    "6 roast levels from gentle to extra dark intensity",
    "ISO 22000:2018 certified production facility",
    "Rated 4.9/5 by customers"
  ],
  "warnings": [
    "Do not describe AoDai as flavored coffee - it's pure Vietnamese coffee only",
    "Do not mix AoDai positioning with Nonla flavor messaging",
    "Avoid comparing to regular instant coffee brands - position as cafe-quality",
    "Don't undersell the strength - emphasize Robusta's bold character",
    "Maintain focus on Vietnamese heritage and authenticity",
    "Don't suggest it needs milk or sugar - highlight pure coffee experience"
  ],
  "recommended_focus": [
    "Target strong coffee seekers frustrated with weak mainstream options",
    "Emphasize convenience without compromising on quality or strength",
    "Highlight Vietnamese coffee heritage as premium differentiator",
    "Lead with tasting set to let customers find their perfect intensity",
    "Use 35% OFF first order as primary conversion driver",
    "Position as upgrade from both weak instant and expensive coffee shops",
    "Focus on pure coffee credentials - no additives or artificial flavors",
    "Leverage freeze-dried technology as quality preservation story"
  ]
}
